news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Dividend Growth ETF (FRIZ)

holdings.infoBox: FRIZ is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 5.83%, Broadcom at 4.74%, Apple at 4.42%, Eli Lilly and Company at 4.31%, and JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 4.31%.

overview.description: The Franklin Dividend Growth ETF (FRIZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects stocks the fund manager considers dividend growth companies. The fund may include firms from around the globe across market capitalizations and sectors. FRIZ was launched on Aug 28, 2025 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches Franklin Dividend Growth ETF (FRIZ)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton today announced the launch of the Franklin Dividend Growth ETF (NYSE: FRIZ), an actively managed exchange-traded fund designed to seek long-term ...
